---
title: import-alias-naming
description: "Enforce conventional import aliases."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Enforce conventional import aliases. Strider default: lower-case letters and digits.

## Bad

```go
import JSON_API "example.com/json-api"
```

## Good

```go
import jsonapi "example.com/json-api"
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only import-alias-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
